subject: Paras, an orange crab-like insect Pokemon with large blue eyes and two tochukaso mushrooms growing from its back, sitting in a forest setting
description: An orange, crab-like insect creature crouches on a leaf or low ground among lush green ferns and forest undergrowth. It has large, round, protruding blue eyes and a pair of small pincers or fangs visible at the front. Most visually striking are the two mushrooms growing from its back: one large red-capped mushroom with yellow spots and a smaller red-capped companion behind it. The surrounding environment is dense and green, with sunlight filtering through foliage in warm yellows. The overall composition is naturalistic and lush, evoking a forest floor ecosystem.
foreground: Orange crab-insect creature with large blue eyes and two red-capped mushrooms on its back, crouching on a leaf
background: Dense green forest undergrowth with ferns, warm filtered sunlight
